title: RAYITO 3 Pack Coffee Wood Dog Chew Toy - S, Dogs Chew Toys Dog Woods Chew Puppy Teething Toy Puppy Chew Toys Coffee Wood Stick for Small and Medium Dogs and Puppies

【Gift】: Puppy Chew is a heartwarming gift for dogs, making dogs happy every day. Dogs can play by themselves or as interactive toys, which is a gift that satisfies both dog owners and dogs. Often used as dog birthday gifts, Christmas gifts, etc.
